title: The National Institutes of Design Act, 2014
full_text: The National Institutes of Design Act, 2014 राष्ट्रीय डिजाइन संस्थान अधिनियम, 2014 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 201418 Act Number: 18 Enactment Date: 2014-07-17 Act Year: 2014 Short Title: The National Institutes of Design Act, 2014 Hindi Title: राष्ट्रीय डिजाइन संस्थान अधिनियम, 2014 Long Title: An Act to declare the institution known as the National Institute of Design, hmedabad, to be an institution of national importance for the promotion of quality and excellence in education,research and training in all disciplines relating to Design and for matters connected therewith or incidental thereto. Ministry: Ministry of Commerce and Industry Department: Department of Promotion of Industry and Internal Trade Enforcement Date: 16-09-2014 Notification: 16th September, 2014 vide notification No. S.O. 2393(E), dated 16th September, 2014, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii). Schedule 1. THE SCHEDULE Order Appendix Forms TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles Show all section The National Institutes of Design Act, 2014 CHAPTER I PRELIMINARY CHAPTER II THE INSTITUTE CHAPTER III MISCELLANEOUS Section 1. Short title and commencement. Show Related Subordinates Section 2. Declaration of certain institutions as institutions of national importance. Section 3. Definitions. Section 4. Incorporation of Institute. Section 5. Effect of incorporation of the Institute. Section 6. Powers of Institute. Section 7. Institute be open to all races, creeds and classes. Section 8. Teaching at Institute. Section 9. Visitor. Section 10. Authorities of Institute. Section 11. Governing Council. Section 12. Term of office of, vacancies among, and allowances payable to Chairperson and other members of Governing Council. Section 13. Meeting of Governing Council. Section 14. Powers and functions of Governing Council. Section 15. Senate. Section 16. Functions of Senate. Section 17. Functions, powers and duties of Chairperson. Section 18. Director. Section 19. Dean. Section 20. Registrar. Section 21. Powers and duties of other authorities and officers. Section 22. Grants by Central Government. Section 23. Fund of Institute. Section 24. Setting up of Endowment Fund. Section 25. Accounts and audit. Section 26. Pension and provident fund. Section 27. Appointment of staff. Section 28. Statutes. Show Related Subordinates Section 29. Statutes how to be made. Section 30. Ordinances. Show Related Subordinates Section 31. Ordinances how to be made. Section 32. Arbitral Tribunal. Section 33. Acts and proceedings not to be invalidated by vacancies, etc. Section 34. Sponsored schemes. Section 35. Power of Institute to grant degrees, etc. Section 36. Powers of Central Government to issue directions. Section 37. Institute to be public authority under Right to Information Act, 2005. Section 38. Power of Central Government to make rules. Show Related Subordinates Section 39. Transitional provisions. Section 40. Statutes and Ordinances to be published in the Official Gazette and to be laid before Parliament. Section 41. Power to remove difficulties. Schedule 1.
